introSection: Big Scenic Railway was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Palisades Amusement Park in Cliffside Park, New Jersey, USA. The ride was destroyed by fire on August 13, 1944.
fullText: Big Scenic Railway was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Palisades Amusement Park in Cliffside Park, New Jersey, USA. The ride was destroyed by fire on August 13, 1944.
